title: Change '确认' button text color to black

requirements.summary: Change the text color of all '确认' (Confirm) buttons throughout the application to black (#000000 or text-black)
acceptanceCriteria: All '确认' button labels render in black text across every modal and form in the application.
The change applies consistently in UploadPasscodeModal, DeletePasscodeModal, and any other component containing a '确认' button.
No other button styles or colors are affected.

file_operations.description: Modify the '确认' button in UploadPasscodeModal to apply text-black class or inline style color: '#000000' to the button text, ensuring the text renders in black while preserving all other button styles (background, border, padding, etc.).

Modify the '确认' button in DeletePasscodeModal to apply text-black class or inline style color: '#000000' to the button text, ensuring the text renders in black while preserving all other button styles (background, border, padding, etc.).
